title: Zillow Expands AI Tools as Revenue Jumps in Flat Market
text: Zillow AI Technology Integration and Market Share Analysis. Revenue Growth and AI Impact: Zillow Group reported an 18% year-over-year revenue increase to $708 million in its latest quarter, crediting AI integration across its platforms for faster feature rollouts and deeper user engagement. Key AI Initiatives: AI mode, which allows homebuyers to find listings, ask affordability questions and explore other housing-related topics, is now live in 5 percent of Zillow markets. Zillow has announced a partnership with OpenAI to integrate Zillow search into ChatGPT, making Zillow the only real estate app available in ChatGPT, allowing users to explore listings, financing options and housing insights through the AI platform. Zillow recently introduced Zillow Pro, an AI-powered suite unifying critical agent tools like Follow Up Boss, My Agent, and Agent Profiles to help real estate professionals close more transactions and deliver a seamless client experience. Competitive Positioning: The Seattle-based market leader noted that access to proprietary rich media means that 3D floor plans and 'Showcase' are on nearly 10% of new for-sale listings coming to its portal, "the largest immersive-media coverage in the industry." AI Advantage: Zillow's structural AI advantage stems from its massive proprietary dataset, billions of images, and deep integration into home buying workflows, positioning the company to capitalize on AI adoption more effectively than competitors.
